sourcesContent:
export const sliderItems = [
  {
    id: 1,
    img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519494026892-80bbd2d6fd0d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80',
    title: 'Meet Our Experienced Doctors',
    desc: 'Our team of dedicated doctors is committed to providing you with the highest quality medical care. With years of experience and expertise.',
    bg: '121F3D',
    button: 'See More',
    route: '/doctors',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1538108149393-fbbd81895907?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80',
    title: 'Advancing Medical Science',
    desc: 'Our skilled laboratory researchers work tirelessly to push the boundaries of medical knowledge, contributing to innovative treatments.',
    bg: '0A1128',
    button: 'Explore Now',
    route: '/About',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579684385127-1ef15d508118?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80',
    title: 'Compassionate Care',
    desc: 'Our compassionate and caring hospital staff is here to support you throughout your healthcare journey. We prioritize your comfort.',
    bg: '1B2A4A',
  },
];
